## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.52

### Camera WebRTC
- Continues prerelease camera testing for accounts where the camera connects but the screen remains black.
- Fixes the native raw H264 frame queue crash seen after SDP answer, ICE completion, and first video frame detection.
- Keeps X-Sense WebRTC camera video on the native raw H264 path without video transcoding.

### Debug Logging
- Prevents first-frame debug logging from interrupting H264 frame delivery.
- Stops stale closed or expired WebRTC signal sessions from reconnecting forever after the camera stream has already ended.
